title: GitLab Pipeline With Rules and Artifacts
description:
## A Real Multi-Stage Pipeline

**Your task:** write **`/root/pipeline.yml`** that:
1. declares **`stages`**: `build`, `test`, `deploy`
2. has a **`build`** job (stage build) that produces **`artifacts`** (an `artifacts.paths` list)
3. has a **`deploy`** job that uses **`needs`** and a **`rules`** clause (e.g. only on the default branch)

> 💡 Validate the YAML with `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/root/pipeline.yml'))"`.

hints.title: Stages, artifacts, needs, rules
hints.body: Declare the stage order, attach artifacts.paths to build, and gate deploy with rules + needs.
hints.command:
printf 'stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo building
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - build
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo deploying
' > /root/pipeline.yml

validation.description: Checks the stages list and the presence of artifacts, needs and rules.

commands.command: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/root/pipeline.yml')); s=d.get('stages'); print('ok' if s==['build','test','deploy'] else 'no')"
